mnemonics: NEURONS: Neural Networks Essentially Use Representations Of Numerous Signals (Describes how artificial neurons process inputs to learn complex representations).
keyPoints: Deep Learning uses multi-layered neural networks to learn hierarchical representations of data.
It learns through a process of forward propagation and backpropagation to adjust internal weights.
The models are capable of automatically discovering the representations needed for classification or detection from raw data.
commonMistakes: Assuming more layers always lead to a better model (can cause overfitting or vanishing gradients).
Using the same learning rate for all problems and throughout the entire training process.
